title: NYC DSNY — Shared Definitions
description: Reusable JSON Schema definitions shared across NYC Department of Sanitation (DSNY) object schemas. Reconciles fields common to the DSNY website's undocumented first-party APIs (dsnypublic.nyc.gov/dsny/api, the ePickups pickup-request API, the CFC appointment API), the NYC Open Data DSNY datasets, and the NYC geography spine.

Borough.description: NYC borough. DSNY datasets variously use full name, code (1-5), or abbreviation (BX/BK/MN/QN/SI).

Coordinates.description: WGS84 point. DSNY datasets expose these as latitude/longitude plus a Socrata point/multipolygon geometry.

Geography.description: The NYC geography spine that DSNY point datasets (e-waste, food-scrap, special-waste, litter baskets) carry as computed regions and administrative fields.

SanitationDistrictReference.description: A reference to the DSNY operational geography: District (e.g. 'MN01'), Section, and commercial-waste Zone. Join keys across the DSNY Districts, Sections, Zones, and Frequencies datasets.

Address.description: A street address as accepted by the DSNY collection-schedule geocoder (dsnypublic.nyc.gov/dsny/api/geocoder/DSNYCollection).
